title: Tech Giants Pour Billions into Generative AI Infrastructure
summary: Major tech companies are increasing capital expenditures to secure dominance in the AI race, driving demand for advanced chips.

title: Sensex Hits Lifetime Highs Amid Global Market Rally
summary: The Indian equity market benchmarks climbed to fresh all-time highs following positive global cues and domestic institutional buying.

title: Budget 2026: Expectations High for Personal Tax Relief
summary: Middle-class taxpayers are holding out hope for significant relief in standard deduction limits in the upcoming Union Budget.

title: Indian Startups See Revival in Late-Stage Funding
summary: After a prolonged funding winter, multiple late-stage Indian startups have successfully raised growth capital over the past month.
